title: Spicy Fluffy Saudia Tofu Stir-fry
description: A high-protein-friendly dish featuring marinated tofu that's perfect for post-workout meals or as a quick lunch.

ingredients.name: Sauce ingredients
ingredients.amount: 3 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp sesame oil, 1 tsp black pepper, 1/4 cup hot sauce (such as sriracha or harissa)

ingredients.name: Vegetables
ingredients.amount: 2 cups bell peppers, sliced; 1 red onion, thinly sliced; 8 cherry tomatoes

ingredients.name: Spices
ingredients.amount: Pinch of cumin seeds, crushed to release oil; pinch of coriander seeds, ground finely

instructions: Marinate tofu in the sauce ingredients for at least an hour.
Heat a pan with a little oil. Add cumin and coriander seeds, stir until fragrant and lightly browned.
Add sliced onions and bell peppers to the pan and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Place marinated tofu in the pan, cover, and simmer for another 10 minutes or until fully cooked through.
Stir in chopped cherry tomatoes. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until heated through.
Season with salt if needed and serve.
